zh.lifeSummary: 當Adele de Ponthieu於1035年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆時，她的父親Hugues de Ponthieu II32歲，母親Bertha d'Aumale30歲。她和Comte Eustache de Picquigny至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1087年在法國豪-德-福朗斯享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ponthieu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Pontier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Francisco, Mercedes, Osvaldo, Ramon, Roberto.  French Jean-Pierre, Pierre.
French and Dutch: occupational name for a toll keeper on a bridge, from an agent derivative of pont ‘bridge’. This surname is also found in the Dominican Republic.
History: The first recorded bearer of the surname Pontier in the US was Lewis Pontier, born in MD in the 1800s. His origins are not known.

nameMeanings.name: Adele
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From French Adèle , an ancient name popular in medieval Europe because of the fame of a 7th-century saint, a daughter of the Frankish king Dagobert II. It is of Germanic origin, from adal ‘noble’ (a short form of a two-element name such as Adelheid; see Adelaide ). It was the name of William the Conqueror's youngest daughter ( c.1062–1137 ), who became the wife of Stephen of Blois. However, it died out in England in the later Middle Ages. It was revived in the 19th century, being the name of a character in Johann Strauss's opera Die Fledermaus. Its popularity was further reinforced in the 1930s as the name of a character in the novels of Dornford Yates .

en.lifeSummary: When Adele de Ponthieu was born in 1035, in Somme, Picardie, France, her father, Hugues de Ponthieu II, was 32 and her mother, Bertha d'Aumale, was 30. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Comte Eustache de Picquigny. She died in 1087, in Hauts-de-France, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adele de Ponthieu est née en 1035, à Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Hugues de Ponthieu II, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Bertha d'Aumale, avait 30 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Comte Eustache de Picquigny. Elle est décédée en 1087, à Hauts-de-France, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adele de Ponthieu 1035 in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Ponthieu II 32 und ihre Mutter Bertha d'Aumale 30. Sie hatte mit Comte Eustache de Picquigny mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1087 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Hauts-de-France, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Ponthieu è nata il nel 1035 nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, sua padre, Hugues de Ponthieu II, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Bertha d'Aumale, aveva 30 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con Comte Eustache de Picquigny. Morì nel 1087, nel Hauts-de-France, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Adele de Ponthieuが1035年にフランスピカーディソンメで生まれた時，父Hugues de Ponthieu IIは32歳，母Bertha d'Aumaleは30歳であった。彼女はComte Eustache de Picquignyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1087年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Adele de Ponthieu(이)가 1035년 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Ponthieu II(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertha d'Aumale(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 Comte Eustache de Picquigny(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1087년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adele de Ponthieu nasceu em 1035, em Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Bertha d'Aumale, tinha 30 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com Comte Eustache de Picquigny. Ela faleceu em 1087, em Hauts-de-France, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adele de Ponthieu родилась в 1035 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Ponthieu II было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Bertha d'Aumale, 30. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Comte Eustache de Picquigny. Она умерла в 1087 г. в местности хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adele de Ponthieu nació en 1035, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Ponthieu II, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Bertha d'Aumale, tenía 30 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con Comte Eustache de Picquigny. Murió en 1087, en Hauts-de-France, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
